summary: Good-quality recording praised for its sources, but no specific show details mentioned
review: The reviewer highlights the strength of the audio sources—particularly the Koucky Sen 441 and MKE 2002—rating this version as one of their favorites. No comments are made about the musical performance or setlist, so the show quality cannot be assessed from this review.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single 4‑star review focusing on audio sources; no information on performance, so rating leans toward the recording quality while remaining modest due to lack of show data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer mentions several good source recordings (Koucky Sen 441 and MKE 2002) and states this version is their favorite, indicating clear and pleasant audio.
